description:
Returns the Marketplace listings. If MasterSKu is not present, then the listing is not mapped to any master. Keep increasing the page number till it gives an empty array to get all the listings. Page size increment is not recommended. | **Parameters** | **Data Type** | **Description** | **Mandatory** | **Remarks** | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | marketPlaceID | Integer | Enter the marketplace ID, which can be obtained by the "getmarketplacelist" function | Yes | NA | | pageSize | Integer | Enter the Limit for the no. of data entries to be shown for a single page. | No | Default value: 50
Maximum limit: 5000 | | pageNumber | Integer | Enter the page number | No | NA | | sku | Integer | Fetch listing based on sku. | No | NA | | identifier | Integer | Fetch listing based on specific identifier. | No | NA |
